description.value: Aura faint divination; CL 3rd; Slot none; Price 1,500 gp; Weight – DESCRIPTION This apparently simple coin, usually styled to resemble ancient currency, hides intricate gold and platinum wires within. This matrix causes the Pathfinderâs coin to rise an inch into the air and slowly spin in place if placed atop a wayfinder. In addition, when levitating above a wayfinder, the coin can be given a message of 25 words or fewer. This message repeats in the speakerâs voice the next time the coin is floated above a wayfinder. Only one message may be stored at a time, and once it is triggered, the message is expended and a new one may be recorded. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Wondrous Item, identify, levitate, magic mouth; Cost 750 gp.
